scripts.check:conformance: deno test --config deno.json --allow-read --allow-sys=cpus packages/sdk/test/conformance.test.ts && pnpm check:capnp
scripts.test: deno test --config deno.json --allow-read --allow-write --allow-sys=cpus packages/sdk/test/sdk.test.ts packages/sdk/test/conformance.test.ts packages/sdk/test/hashing.test.ts
scripts.check: pnpm check:mocks && pnpm check:types && pnpm test && pnpm check:capnp
